scripts.ollama:pull: npm run ollama:up && docker compose exec ollama ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:3b
scripts.ollama:pull:7b: npm run ollama:up && docker compose exec ollama ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b
scripts.ollama:list: npm run ollama:up && docker compose exec ollama ollama list
scripts.dev:desktop:ai: npm run init-env && npm run ollama:pull && concurrently -k "docker compose up --build backend" "npm --prefix Frontend run electron:dev"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run init-env && concurrently -k "docker compose up --build backend" "npm --prefix Frontend run electron:dev"
scripts.dev:hot: npm run init-env && concurrently -k "docker compose up --build backend" "npm --prefix Frontend run start"
scripts.dev:docker: npm run init-env && docker compose up --build
scripts.dev:docker:ai: npm run init-env && npm run ollama:pull && docker compose up --build
